reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user information and returned the GitHub username without errors
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - page loaded with sidebar containing three agents, including "QA-20260421-191822-29jd" with status "idle"
Clicked agent "QA-20260421-191822-29jd" in sidebar - agent detail page opened showing message input field and session management
Verified agent status is "idle" - confirmed by status indicator in top section showing "idle" badge

Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - message was typed into input field and sent successfully, session "GitHub Username Verification Session" was created
GitHub account access request card appeared - card showed "Allow access to GitHub to look up the username?" with GitHub account already checked, clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant access
Waited 10 seconds - agent continued processing and displayed "API Request Review" card requesting permission for "GET /user" request
Clicked "Allow" on API request review and selected "Allow Once" - permission was granted and agent continued processing
Waited 10 more seconds - agent completed execution with status changed to "idle"
Verified response includes GitHub username - response displayed "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with username clearly visible, total elapsed time was 42 seconds
